description: Dollar-equity divergence (UUP/DXY vs SPY) with EM (EEM) confirmation. DOLLAR_STRESS_RICH (eurodollar stress, long UUP/SH/GLD) or DOLLAR_TAILWIND_RICH (risk-on weak USD). Bruno-Shin 2015. Daily 21 UTC.
